methodsAttempted.query: site:brown.edu Brown University generative AI policy academic integrity students instructors privacy AI tools
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned Provost, Sheridan Center, OIT, University Communications, Library, School of Public Health, pre-college, humanities, and other Brown results.
Web search identified the current OIT Google Gemini Chat and NotebookLM AI Services page.

methodsAttempted.query: site:brown.edu "Protecting Information When Using AI Tools"
methodsAttempted.notes: Web search identified the OIT sensitive-information guidance page and PDF variant.
Web search found the current University Communications guidance and an older brown.edu path.

methodsAttempted.query: site:brown.edu "Classroom Policies for AI Generative Tools"
methodsAttempted.notes: Found Sheridan-hosted external classroom-policy collection; rejected as non-Brown-specific evidence.

summary: Discovery found six official Brown sources suitable for narrow staged claims: Provost AI academic-mission guidance, Sheridan Center teaching guidance, OIT information-protection guidance, OIT Gemini/NotebookLM service guidance, University Communications AI guidelines, and OIT research-tool guidance. Six additional official or Brown-hosted pages were rejected as external collections, generic/non-policy guidance, duplicate school-level summaries, career advice, research showcase, or course-specific content.
